query: SELECT id, title, imageUrl FROM news_items WHERE imageUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' LIMIT 10; SELECT id, title, imageUrl FROM news_items WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' AND imageUrl NOT LIKE 'http%' LIMIT 5;
